◎简　　介  

　　Kelen Coleman (The Newsroom), Andy Ridings (Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt) and Matt Dellapina (These Hopeless Savages) have joined the cast of Lionsgate’s Dirty Thirty, along with YouTube star Drew Monson and Ant Man‘s Anna Akana.
